name: JSkills Basketball Clinic
taglines: Train skills mold character preach the Gospel
mission: Develop real basketball skills through structured, progressive training.
Build discipline, teamwork, and Christ-centered character on and off the court.
Serve players of every age and skill level — from first-time beginners to advanced athletes.

about.story: JSkills Basketball Clinic was founded with one goal: help every player grow with purpose. We combine skill development, strength and conditioning, and character formation in a training environment rooted in faith and excellence.
differentiators: Personalized program planning after every player's evaluation session
1-on-1 and group training options across Metro Manila
Faith-driven coaching — skills, character, and the Gospel
Inclusive training for all ages and skill levels
